title: Bookstore Manager
description: A secure Spring Boot Java application designed to manage inventory without complex database overhead.

title: Face Mask Detection
description: Real-time AI system utilizing MobileNetV2 to classify video streams into 'Mask' or 'No Mask' categories.

title: SSH Honeypot
description: A cybersecurity deception tool designed to simulate a vulnerable server, trapping attackers and logging their credentials for threat analysis.

title: HoneyGuard Pro
description: Advanced threat intelligence honeypot featuring a dual-mode architecture: interactive GUI map for local monitoring and headless CLI for Docker cloud deployment.

title: Multi-Layered Image Steganography
description: is a high-security steganography tool that uses AES-256-GCM encryption and randomized pixel-shuffling to hide private messages inside images, ensuring they are invisible to the eye and impossible to extract without the correct secret key.
